testcase.name: MWE: test something @myTag

failure.message: The base image is of 720 X 1280 and actual image is of 4527 X 1280. Please use images of same dimensions so as to avoid any unexpected results.

testcase.failure: Error: The base image is of 720 X 1280 and actual image is of 4527 X 1280.
